name: Sequential Thinking MCP
description: Enables structured step-by-step reasoning for complex problems, letting AI models break tasks into revisable thought sequences with branching.

skills.name: Sequential Reasoning
skills.description: Breaks complex problems into numbered thought steps the model can revise, branch, or extend before arriving at an answer.

skills.name: Thought Branching
skills.description: Creates alternative reasoning paths from any prior thought step, letting models explore multiple approaches in parallel.

skills.name: Dynamic Step Count
skills.description: Adjusts the total number of reasoning steps dynamically as the problem scope becomes clearer during the chain.
